title: Synchronous FIFO Overflow Bug
description: The FIFO fails to block writes when the full flag is high.
bug_signature: assign full = (count == DEPTH - 1); // Should be == DEPTH
expected_root_cause: Off-by-one error in full-flag logic allows an extra write that overwrites the first entry.

title: Synchronous FIFO Underflow Bug
description: The FIFO asserts empty even when one element remains.
expected_root_cause: Premature empty flag assertion prevents the last byte from being read.
